title: dracocephalum velutinum var. velutinum
intro: Dracocephalum velutinum var. velutinum, also known as Velvet Dragon's Head or Dragon Flower, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system, promoting relaxation and reducing stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea, infused in oil, or dried to be used in capsules or tinctures, offering a natural remedy for various health concerns.
